Episodes.Title: Kid in a Candy Store
Episodes.Writer: Clyde Phillips, James Manos Jr., Jeff Lindsay
Episodes.Actors: Patrick Gibson, Christian Slater, Molly Brown
Episodes.Plot: Dexter adjusts to his new job as a forensics intern at Miami Metro; Deb lashes out at her dad by engaging in petty criminal behavior.

Episodes.Title: Miami Vice
Episodes.Writer: Clyde Phillips, James Manos Jr., Jeff Lindsay
Episodes.Actors: Patrick Gibson, Christian Slater, Molly Brown
Episodes.Plot: Dexter targets a loan shark connected to Batista. Meanwhile, Deb hosts a party hoping to gain favor with her volleyball teammates.

Episodes.Title: Fender Bender
Episodes.Writer: Clyde Phillips, James Manos Jr., Jeff Lindsay
Episodes.Actors: Patrick Gibson, Christian Slater, Molly Brown
Episodes.Plot: Dexter targets a retired mob hitman (who may still be killing), as Harry works the gruesome murder case of a ten-year-old boy; Deb sneaks into a nightclub with Sofia and meets an exciting new friend.

Episodes.Title: F Is for Fuck-Up
Episodes.Writer: Clyde Phillips, James Manos Jr., Jeff Lindsay
Episodes.Actors: Patrick Gibson, Christian Slater, Molly Brown
Episodes.Plot: After a kill goes wrong, Dexter is grounded by Harry; Deb deepens her relationship with Gio, and bonds with her brother on the anniversary of their mothers death.

Episodes.Title: The Joy of Killing
Episodes.Writer: Clyde Phillips, James Manos Jr., Jeff Lindsay
Episodes.Actors: Patrick Gibson, Christian Slater, Molly Brown
Episodes.Plot: Miami Metro is shaken by a kidnapping that hits close to home, as Dexter sets his sights on a killer that slipped through the cracks of the justice system. But first, Dexter must survive a double date with Deb and her new boyfriend.
